title: Medical device discontinuation: Bipap a40 pro ca - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical device discontinuation: Bipap a40 pro ca
The Bipap a40 pro ca is currently reported as a medical device discontinuation under sections 62.21 to 62.26 of the Medical Devices Regulations . For a full list of shortages, refer to the list of shortages and discontinuations .
